PostToolUse.description: Auto-lint Python files after Claude writes them

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd backend && ruff check "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE" --fix --quiet && ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE" --quiet && echo "[hook] lint passed: $CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE"; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Warn when writing to migrations/versions/ — remind to review before applying

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE" == *migrations/versions/* ]]; then echo "[MIGRATION WRITTEN] Review this file carefully before running make migrate. Check for DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, or nullable issues."; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Remind to update CLAUDE.md Current Project Phase when day is complete

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT_FILE" == *CLAUDE.md ]]; then echo "[CLAUDE.md updated] Good — phase tracker is current."; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block destructive database commands without explicit confirmation

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|DELETE FROM .* WHERE 1|TRUNCATE|alembic downgrade base"; then echo "[BLOCKED] Destructive DB command detected. You must explicitly confirm this in your next message before Claude proceeds."; exit 1; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block accidental rm -rf on source directories

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "rm -rf (backend|web|mobile|desktop|infra|migrations)"; then echo "[BLOCKED] Attempted rm -rf on a source directory. This is not allowed."; exit 1; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Warn before kubectl delete or helm uninstall in production

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "kubectl delete|helm uninstall|helm delete"; then echo "[WARNING] Kubernetes destructive command. Confirm this is intentional and targeting the correct namespace."; fi'

SessionStart.description: Print orientation reminder at the start of every session

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "\n=== F1 Strategy Engine — Session Start ==="; echo "1. Read CLAUDE.md in full"; echo "2. Check git log --oneline -10"; echo "3. Check Current Project Phase in CLAUDE.md"; echo "4. Then begin the day tasks"; echo "=========================================\n"'
